title: Introduction to Machine Learning Fundamentals
description: Learn the core concepts of machine learning including supervised learning, unsupervised learning, and neural networks. This comprehensive course covers algorithms, data preprocessing, model evaluation, and practical implementation using Python and popular ML libraries.

title: Advanced Deep Learning with TensorFlow
description: Master advanced deep learning techniques using TensorFlow and Keras. Explore convolutional neural networks, recurrent neural networks, GANs, and transformer architectures. Build complex AI models for computer vision, natural language processing, and more.

title: React.js Complete Developer Bootcamp
description: Comprehensive React.js course covering hooks, context API, state management with Redux, testing, and deployment. Build real-world applications including e-commerce sites, social media platforms, and dashboard applications using modern React patterns.

title: Blockchain Development with Solidity
description: Learn blockchain development from scratch using Solidity and Ethereum. Understand smart contracts, DeFi protocols, NFTs, and Web3 integration. Build decentralized applications (dApps) and deploy them to various blockchain networks.

title: Data Visualization with Python and D3.js
description: Master data visualization techniques using Python libraries (Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly) and D3.js for interactive web visualizations. Learn to create compelling charts, dashboards, and interactive data stories that communicate insights effectively.

title: Cloud Architecture on AWS
description: Comprehensive AWS cloud architecture course covering EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, and other core services. Learn to design scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud solutions. Prepare for AWS Solutions Architect certification with hands-on projects.
